---
title: 'Growing Up'
date: '2014-02-01T05:01:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Connor David Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '787290626048597953'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/growing-up.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Connor David Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>How did 9 years go by already? I expected to start this journal a LONG time ago. You and I haven't always gotten along. You want my attention and I've been too busy for you. I'm going to try to do better this year. </p>
<p>You most likely have a higher IQ than I do, which means you're genius. That gift comes with it's own challenges. Try to give grace to those who don't seem to "get it". </p>
<p>I'm really proud of you and how you're turning out. </p>
<p>Love <u>Daddy</u></p>
